title: Buttery Canadian Bread Casserole
description: A simple and delicious casserole made with bread, butter, and a dash of Canadian flavor.
instructions: Cut the bread into 1-inch cubes and set aside.
In a large skillet, melt 2 tablespoons of butter over medium heat.
Add the crushed casserole and cook for 2-3 minutes, stirring frequently.
Add the shredded cheese and stir until melted and smooth.
In a large mixing bowl, combine the bread cubes and cheese mixture. Stir until the bread is evenly coated.
Transfer the mixture to a 9x13-inch baking dish and dot the top with the remaining 2 tablespoons of butter.
Bake for 20-25 minutes, or until the top is golden brown and the casserole is heated through.
